𝗚𝗘𝗢𝗦𝗘𝗡𝗧𝗜𝗡𝗘𝗟 | Real-time global movement monitoring and geopolitical awareness for analysis and decision-making.  ✨ Notable!

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 💻 HTML 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Real-time global movement monitoring and geopolitical awareness for analysis and decision-making.
📅 Created: Jan 2026 • Updated: Jun 2026

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Real-time ship and flight tracking
✅ Aggregation of geodata
✅ Geographic and geopolitical awareness
✅ Analysis and visualization tools
✅ Darkweb search via TOR
✅ Advanced web scraping and OSINT
✅ AI assistant for automated tracking and OSINT
✅ 3D Earth support
✅ Live CCTV feeds
✅ Satellite tracking
✅ Live news feeds
✅ Traffic updates with particle simulation


◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

🍴 297 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 0 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

GeoSentinel is a real-time geospatial monitoring platform that aggregates ship, flight, and geodata to provide global movement awareness. It offers tools for analysis, visualization, and decision-making, including advanced features like dark web searching and AI-powered assistance.

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/h9zdev/GeoSentinel

CasaOS is an open-source personal cloud operating system designed for ease of use and elegance. It allows users to easily manage applications and services on their own hardware, providing a self-hosted alternative to cloud services.

📅 Created: Nov 2022 • Updated: Jun 2026

✅ Memory management
✅ I/O event handling
✅ User impatience mechanic
✅ Desktop application
✅ Web version (WASM)
✅ Sandbox mode for custom stages
✅ Automation script support
✅ Linter and unit tests

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

You're the OS! is a Python-based game where players act as a computer's operating system. The core gameplay involves managing processes, memory, and I/O events to keep the user happy and prevent system reboots. It can be played as a desktop application or a web version.

𝗦𝗜𝗔 | To autonomously improve the performance of AI models or agents on specific benchmark tasks through a self-correcting and self-refining loop.  🌟 Rising Fast!

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To autonomously improve the performance of AI models or agents on specific benchmark tasks through a self-correcting and self-refining loop.
📅 Created: Mar 2026 • Updated: Jun 2026

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Autonomous performance improvement for AI systems
✅ Iterative refinement loop with meta, target, and feedback agents
✅ Updates both harness and weights of task-specific agents
✅ Supports multiple LLM providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini)
✅ Includes built-in tasks for easy local testing (gpqa, lawbench, etc.)


✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 1.9K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 212 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 3 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

SIA is a Self-Improving AI framework designed to autonomously enhance the performance of any AI system on benchmark tasks. It achieves this through an iterative loop involving a meta-agent, a target agent, and a feedback agent, which collectively refine the target agent's capabilities.

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/hexo-ai/sia

𝗦𝗞𝗜𝗟𝗟𝗦𝗣𝗘𝗖𝗧𝗢𝗥 | Scanning AI agent skills for security vulnerabilities and malicious intent before installation.  🔥 Super Hot!

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Scanning AI agent skills for security vulnerabilities and malicious intent before installation.
📅 Created: Mar 2026 • Updated: Jun 2026

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Multi-format input (Git repos, URLs, zip files, directories, single files)
✅ Detection of 68 vulnerability patterns across 17 categories
✅ Two-stage analysis: static analysis and optional LLM semantic evaluation
✅ Live vulnerability lookups with OSV.dev integration and offline fallback
✅ Multiple output formats (Terminal, JSON, Markdown, SARIF)
✅ Risk scoring with severity labels and recommendations
✅ Baseline and false-positive suppression


✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 11.2K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 903 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 43 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

SkillSpector is a Python-based security scanner designed to detect vulnerabilities, malicious patterns, and security risks in AI agent skills before they are installed. It provides a comprehensive analysis to ensure the safety and integrity of AI agent ecosystems.

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/NVIDIA/SkillSpector
